description_original: Met with an accident and fractured 1 leg. She has healed completely long time ago but this limb is dysfunctional. Looking for a forever loving home.
description_rewritten: Flash is a medium-sized, 24-month-old female mixed-breed dog with short brown fur. She sustained an injury resulting in a fractured one leg, which has healed completely. Despite this, the limb remains dysfunctional. Flash is looking for a forever loving home where she can thrive and receive the care she needs. She is fully vaccinated and sterilized.

description_original: Pooja was founded in a horrible state. She was a friendly dog and used to hang around a taman but, one day she was discovered with a broken hind leg. Someone has lured her with some food and beat her up, broke her leg. She was brought to a vet by my husband to get treatment. Pooja is now a disabled dog. She is in a temporary foster home. Pooja is looking for a forever home. She seeks a person who is good with understanding dogs. Because of her disabled condition she currently does not get along quite well with the foster home dogs (maybe they are too active for her). Pooja will do well with a house that has a compound, just for her to have space to walk around. She also comes with a blue cage which she feels safe inside. Please contact Ms. Visha at
description_rewritten: Pooja is a 24-month-old female, medium-sized, black, short-haired mixed-breed dog. She has a minor injury and walks with one leg. Pooja was found after sustaining a broken hind leg, likely due to an assault. She is vaccinated and sterilized. Pooja is looking for a patient and understanding owner who would appreciate her need for a secure, enclosed space, such as a house with a compound, where she can comfortably walk. She currently has difficulty with active foster dogs. Pooja comes with a blue cage that she finds reassuring.

description_original: Pretty Lady was an abandoned puppy, and has turned out to be a sweet dog who looks like an Australian Shepherd mix. She has a best friend (black mixed breed dog, female, spayed). Preferably, the two dogs should be adopted together as they love each other.
description_rewritten: Pretty Lady is a 24-month-old female mixed-breed dog, approximately medium in size with short brown fur. She is healthy and sterilized. Pretty Lady appears to be an Australian Shepherd mix. She shares a close bond with a companion dog, a spayed female black mixed-breed dog. The shelter hopes the two dogs will find a loving home together, as they enjoy spending time with one another.

description_original: Serena is a very pretty dog who has had it a little rough since she lost her home. I believe she will be a beauty with some love and a place to call home. She's intelligent too! "This dog is one of the dogs rescued from the Klang Pound in April just before D-day (when they are put to death). It has been rehabilitated and urgently needs a loving home as we have limited resources. It is unfortunate that due to the aggressiveness of the contracted dogcatchers, most of these beautiful dogs are not strays and previously had homes. Hence, most of them are sociable and loving. Serving the voiceless, SAS Volunteer. P/s: Please contact Jackie by calling or texting her at, she's a grandma at emails. "
description_rewritten: Serena is a 24-month-old female, medium-sized, black mixed-breed dog. She is healthy and fully vaccinated. Serena was rescued from the Klang Pound and requires a loving home. Due to her previous circumstances, she may be wary of new situations and would thrive in a patient and understanding environment. She is intelligent and deserves a second chance to experience the comfort of a permanent home.

description_original: The following group of dog was forced to be relocate or chase out of their current shelter due to false complaint made by one of the employee in the working area of a lady I know .
description_rewritten: This 12-month-old medium-sized, black dog is looking for a loving home. He is a mixed breed with medium-length fur. Currently, his sterilization status is unknown. He is reported to be healthy. Due to a recent relocation, he is now available for adoption and would thrive in a patient and understanding environment.

description_original: Hunter has a lovely black coat and intelligent eyes. "This dog is one of the dogs rescued from the Klang Pound in April just before D-day (when they are put to death). It has been rehabilitated and urgently needs a loving home as we have limited resources. It is unfortunate that due to the aggressiveness of the contracted dogcatchers, most of these beautiful dogs are not strays and previously had homes. Hence, most of them are sociable and loving. Serving the voiceless, SAS Volunteer. P/s: Please contact Jackie by calling or texting her at, she's a grandma at emails. "
description_rewritten: K-28 Hunter is a 24-month-old female, medium-sized, black mixed-breed dog. She has medium-length fur and intelligent eyes. Hunter was rescued from a pound and requires a loving home. Her history includes previous home ownership, and she is sociable and loving. Hunter’s vaccination and sterilization status are currently unknown.

description_original: Sally is very friendly and quite playful. She has a nice coat and good character as well. She feels very happy when she play and run around.
description_rewritten: Sally is a six-month-old female mixed-breed dog with a short, yellow coat and a medium size. She is a friendly and playful companion, enjoying playtime and running. Sally is fully vaccinated and sterilized and is currently in good health.

description_original: She was adopted from a friend. She can adapt to new environment easily. We love her so much but due to certain circumstances, we no longer can keep her and wish that she will find a new owner who will love and take care of her. She is a good guard dog, independent, toilet trained and well-behaved. She sleeps in a cage at night. She is most happy to have her daily walk.
description_rewritten: Pao Yee is a 30-month-old female, medium-sized, black, short-haired mixed-breed dog. She is fully vaccinated and sterilized and currently living a healthy life. Pao Yee was adopted from a friend and is known to adapt easily to new environments. This independent dog is toilet-trained and well-behaved, and enjoys daily walks. She sleeps in a cage at night. We are searching for a loving owner who will provide her with the care she deserves.

description_original: Abby is 13 years old. The owner wants her euthanised because he is moving house. Please help to give her a home so that she can live out her natural life. She is healthy, gentle and still active, and has been a pet all her life. She is being boarded now, awaiting euthanasia. The owner has abandoned her. Poor Abby. Please help.
description_rewritten: Abby is a 156-month-old female mixed-breed dog. She is medium in size with medium-length black fur and remains healthy and active. Abby has spent her life as a beloved companion and is currently being boarded, awaiting a permanent home. Due to circumstances beyond her control, she needs a loving family to provide a comfortable place for her to live out her remaining years.

description_original: "This dog is one of the dogs rescued from the Klang Pound in April just before D-day (when they are put to death). It has been rehabilitated and urgently needs a loving home as we have limited resources. It is unfortunate that due to the aggressiveness of the contracted dogcatchers, most of these beautiful dogs are not strays and previously had homes. Hence, most of them are sociable and loving. Serving the voiceless, SAS Volunteer. P/s: Please contact Jackie by calling or texting her at, she's a grandma at emails. "
description_rewritten: K-29 Kina is a 24-month-old female mixed-breed dog with a medium-length black coat and a medium size. She was rescued from the Klang Pound in April. Kina is healthy and fully vaccinated and sterilized. She is a sociable and loving dog who needs a loving home. Kina was part of a group of dogs rescued before a scheduled euthanasia. Due to the circumstances of her rescue, she benefits from the support of a SAS Volunteer.

description_original: She is a very sweet dog who loves a lot of attention and is great with children. We previously adopted her from the SPCA. Her previous owner removed her voice therefore she is unable to bark.
description_rewritten: Millie is a sweet, medium-sized, brown dog with short fur. She is 60 months old and a mixed breed. Millie enjoys lots of attention and is good with children. Due to a previous injury, she is unable to bark. Millie is fully vaccinated and sterilized and is currently in good health.

description_original: Skippy is a friendly dog who loves other dogs and is great with kids. She is very affectionate but can't walk too far because of a damaged hip. She was found by a friend of ours after being involved in an accident. She is now a healthy female who is fully house trained has been spade and fully vaccinated. We are leaving Malaysia and need to find her a permanent loving home for her. She makes a great family pet.
description_rewritten: Skippy is a friendly, 24-month-old female mixed-breed dog with short, golden fur. She is medium in size and fully vaccinated and sterilized. Skippy enjoys the company of other dogs and is good with children. Due to a damaged hip, she cannot walk long distances. She was found after being involved in an accident and is currently a healthy dog. Skippy is house-trained and would thrive in a loving, permanent home.

description_original: "This dog is one of the dogs rescued from the Klang Pound in April just before D-day (when they are put to death). It has been rehabilitated and urgently needs a loving home as we have limited resources. It is unfortunate that due to the aggressiveness of the contracted dogcatchers, most of these beautiful dogs are not strays and previously had homes. Hence, most of them are sociable and loving. Serving the voiceless, SAS Volunteer. P/s: Please contact Jackie by calling or texting her at, she's a grandma at emails. "
description_rewritten: Momo is a 24-month-old female mixed-breed dog with medium-length brown fur and a medium size. She was rescued from a pound in April and is now healthy. Momo is sociable and loving, a characteristic developed during her time with the Special Animal Shelter Society (SAS). Having previously lived in a home, she requires a loving and stable environment. She is fully vaccinated and sterilized, and is ready to begin a new chapter with a patient and understanding family.

description_original: Please give local dogs a home Actually they are 4 dogs! There are mother n son one more mother n daughter. They are poor doggies! The bad stall complaint there stay here n disturb their business! Suddenly these poor dogs son n daughter missing! Now leave these 2 mother dogs! This mother dogs actually can live happy with their son n daughter! Too bad human being make them live alone! Human make their family broken! These both mothers also got bad history! They also dump by their owner! They also alaways bully n abuse by human! Both of mother dogs though that can live together be best friend! Too bad their dream can not go thru! Someone warning want they die! I get this news not choice i bring them to the vet! Now they are safe! Keep in the vet make me costly a lot hope! you can open your heart to bring them home! Pls give them a chance! They are spayed! Share pls !
description_rewritten: These two adult mother dogs are looking for a loving home. They are approximately 24 months old and have a short, black coat. Despite a challenging past including previous abandonment and instances of abuse, they share a strong bond and believe they would thrive as a family. The dogs are spayed and currently under veterinary care. They are healthy but unvaccinated. A quiet home where they can receive the attention and companionship they deserve would be ideal. Please consider offering these deserving dogs a second chance at happiness.

description_original: The stray female dog living below my apartment who the feeder constantly feeds gave birth to four puppies. Two of them were adopted, leaving Muffin and Cookie. Muffin is the one with a furry head. Both Muffin and Cookie are very friendly and healthy as good neighbors always feed them with nutritious pet food, bath them weekly and play with them every day. Also they are dewormed, vaccinated and spayed/neutered. However, some heartless people around this area are constantly hitting them with stick,helmet and even steel chain.Today another waste picker threatened to kill them with mouse powder. The feeder is unable to take care of them anymore. It is best to find them a proper home so that they won't have to wander around the street in future. Your little help means a lot to them. Interested kindly contact me via PM.. The location is Penang island. Transportation to other areas can be arranged. Take them home! Thank you.
description_rewritten: Muffin and Cookie are two friendly, healthy 24-month-old female dogs. This mixed-breed pair, one medium-sized with brown fur, is looking for a loving home. They were born to a stray mother and, despite experiencing some past difficulties, are currently vaccinated, spayed, and dewormed. Muffin and Cookie enjoy regular feeding and playtime. They require a patient and understanding household where they can feel safe and secure.

description_original: She has a lovely tiger marking and nature. Do come to see her :) "This dog is one of the dogs rescued from the Klang Pound in April just before D-day (when they are put to death). It has been rehabilitated and urgently needs a loving home as we have limited resources. It is unfortunate that due to the aggressiveness of the contracted dogcatchers, most of these beautiful dogs are not strays and previously had homes. Hence, most of them are sociable and loving. Serving the voiceless, SAS Volunteer. P/s: Please contact Jackie by calling or texting her at, she's a grandma at emails. "
description_rewritten: K-22 Little Tigress is a 24-month-old female, medium-sized, black, mixed-breed dog. She has a distinctive tiger marking and medium-length fur. K-22 was rescued from the Klang Pound and is currently healthy and sterilized. Having previously lived in a home, she is sociable and loving. She urgently needs a loving home, and we have limited resources to support her.

description_original: She is lovely,playful and can be a bit shy but warms up easily and loves the company of other dogs and humans.She knows basic commands to sit and off food. She sleeps inside cage during night time and toilet trained well. We love her so much but due to certain circumstances, we no longer can keep her and wish that she will find a new owner who will love and take care of her.
description_rewritten: Rambutan is a twelve-month-old female mixed-breed dog, approximately medium size with medium-length yellow fur. She is playful and enjoys the company of other dogs and humans. Rambutan is well-trained, knowing basic commands such as “sit” and “off”. She sleeps indoors and is toilet-trained. Despite being a little shy at first, she warms up quickly and is a loving companion.

description_original: Hello everyone, Her name is baby. She is 2-3 years old. I found her in Sentul Market with injured leg 2months ago. All this while we took care of her till she recover. But now we've been facing problems from neighbour. We can’t take care of her permanently because we already have 3 more adopted dogs at home. I really need someone who can take care and give a safe shelter for baby. She is a very loving, playful and active doggy. Those who interest to adopt her, please PM me. Thank you very much.
description_rewritten: Baby is a 29-month-old, medium-sized, golden-colored, short-haired mixed-breed female dog. Two months ago, she was found in Sentul Market with an injured leg. She has since recovered and is currently healthy. Baby is a loving, playful, and active dog. Due to space constraints and caring for three other adopted dogs, she needs a new home where she can receive a safe and permanent shelter.

description_original: This beautiful girl was rescued from sri kembangan apartment as management called MPSJ and we managed to save her from the pack. She is extremely friendly and is playful! My sister has been feeding her daily and even got her spayed & vaccinated. Please give her a home ASAP and love her! We are also looking for people to foster her at the moment as she is not safe in the condo area.
description_rewritten: Dini is a 24-month-old female, medium-sized, black, short-haired mixed-breed dog. She is spayed and vaccinated. Dini was rescued from a multi-dog situation in Sri Kembangan. She is a friendly and playful dog. Currently, she is seeking a loving home and we are also exploring foster care options for her, as she requires a safe environment outside of the apartment complex.

description_original: These dogs were found abandoned and malnourished They were rescued by a kind soul who has now no place to keep them , being turned out of the kennels he was renting at Jabatan Veterinar, Penang. Please help find them a home or a place where we can keep them and take care of them ona daily basis. The dogs are very friendly and loving. Though the are adult dogs, they are as adaptable as puppies, but are less destructive to your belongings, than puppies.
description_rewritten: This large, black, mixed-breed dog is 36 months old. He was found abandoned and malnourished and is currently seeking a loving home. Despite his past, he is a friendly and affectionate dog, displaying the adaptability of a younger animal. While an adult, he exhibits the good behavior of a puppy, minimizing destructive tendencies. His vaccination and sterilization status are currently unknown. A calm and patient household would be ideal for this gentle dog.

description_original: Courty is named after the food court where she used to live as a stray. She's already 6 years old, healthy and spayed. I have found her when she was 1 year old and never managed to find her a forever home. She is very sensitive and emotional doggie that needs lots of attention and love. She's obedient and quiet. Loves children and people in general. Would be great as a pet for a family with kids. Please, give me a call if you think she would be right dog for you.
description_rewritten: Courty is a medium-sized, yellow mixed-breed dog, 72 months old. She is healthy and sterilized. Courty is a sensitive and emotional dog who thrives on attention and love. She is obedient and quiet, and enjoys the company of children and people. Courty would bring joy to a family home.

description_original: Found this dog wandering on the street. She is friendly and obedient.
description_rewritten: Caramel is a medium-sized, black, mixed-breed dog approximately 60 months old. She was found wandering and has a friendly and obedient nature. Her fur is medium in length. We are currently unsure of her vaccination and sterilization status, but she is currently reported as healthy. Caramel would thrive in a loving home where she can enjoy daily walks and companionship.

description_original: Hello, this is Vanilla, she is a pup of my pet dog. we gave her to her current owner since she was three months old. Unfortunately, now the owner can no longer take care of her due to family issue. So we need to find her another owner. She is loving, cute and active. Please take her in if you consider to breed a dog as she can be good companion and gate watcher. Vanilla is in need a permanent home, if anyone interested please let me know on.
description_rewritten: Vanilla is a 27-month-old female, medium-sized mixed-breed dog with short brown fur. She is currently sterilized and up-to-date on her vaccinations. Vanilla is a healthy and active dog who enjoys being a companion. She was previously living with her pet dog and her owner, but needs to find a permanent home due to a family situation. Vanilla would thrive in a home where she can be an active member of the family and potentially serve as a watchful guardian.

description_original: hi,im a animal lover,this cute dog i rescued from my area street,is so pity when im first met him,is in a raining nite,his body just shaking because is cold,after that,i just decided to rescued him,i realy cannot see the dog like that,my heart feel sad,i just bring the dog stay my house 1 nite,after tomorrow,i ask my friend help me take care for temparory,and i used mouli on this dog name,after 9months,my friend not able takecare because need to go oversea work,realy hope can help him to look for good owner,and this dog is prefer live with human,not realy like mix other dogs,can anyone give him a warm forever home?his a soft,playful,active dog,suitable for people whoever house dont have dog and retire person.
description_rewritten: Mouli is a medium-sized, brown, mixed-breed dog, approximately 60 months old. He was rescued from the streets and initially a fragile dog, having spent a cold, rainy night shaking with cold. Mouli is a playful and active dog who enjoys the company of people. He is a soft and gentle companion, and would thrive in a quiet home, particularly with a retired person who doesn’t already have a canine companion. Mouli is sterilized and his vaccination status is currently unknown. He is looking for a loving forever home where he can feel safe and cherished.

description_original: Adopt Auntieeee... "This dog is one of the dogs rescued from the Klang Pound in April just before D-day (when they are put to death). It has been rehabilitated and urgently needs a loving home as we have limited resources. It is unfortunate that due to the aggressiveness of the contracted dogcatchers, most of these beautiful dogs are not strays and previously had homes. Hence, most of them are sociable and loving. Serving the voiceless, SAS Volunteer. P/s: Please contact Jackie by calling or texting her at, she's a grandma at emails. "
description_rewritten: K-12 Auntie Moca is a 48-month-old female mixed-breed dog with medium-length brown fur and a medium size. She was rescued from a pound in Klang. Auntie Moca is currently healthy. Due to her previous history, she benefits from a patient and loving home environment. She requires a dedicated owner to help her adjust to a new life.

description_original: His Been 8 year ady.....He Love alot of Attention We are going to Move that why We cant take him with us.......So To those who LOve Dog Please Take good care of him
description_rewritten: Maxtor is a medium-sized, short-haired brown dog. He is 102 months old, and while his vaccination and sterilization status are currently unknown, he is currently healthy. Maxtor loves attention and would thrive in a home where he receives plenty of love and companionship. Due to a recent move, he is seeking a patient and caring owner to provide him with a comfortable and loving environment.

description_original: I am finding a kind soul who can help care for this dog. He's found with TVT virus, a tumour that can be cured. He'll need to take medicine and chemotherapy injection every Saturday (so far 2 injection done, may needed 4 more depends on condition). All expenses will be covered by me, I can also help on transportation, but need someone help to take care as I am having private issue. Please do let me know if anyone can help. Kindly contact Thanks.
description_rewritten: Bongo is a medium-sized, black, short-haired mixed-breed dog, 36 months old. He has a minor injury and was found with the TVT virus, requiring ongoing medication and chemotherapy injections, currently twice a week. He has received two injections so far, with the need for additional treatments depending on his condition. Bongo is looking for a caretaker to assist with his care needs.

description_original: POSTED ON BEHALF OF OUR FRIEND MANDY. please kindly contact her directly if you wish to adopt: . TQ :) Pinky is one of the community cat that our friend-Mandy taking care of. Pinky lives at the back alley of her house and she feeds the group of cats daily. Pinky is a very very adorable, sweet, friendly, manja and tame cat. She loves dog and is very attached with one of the community dog - Bobby. Bobby is a sweet and friendly dog too and she gets along well with Pinky and the cats. Unfortunately past two weeks Pinky dissapeared for two days and she was found with severe injuries on her back side and it bleeds badly. It was diagnosed as dog bite wound and we believe that Pinky might got bite by other stray dogs around that area..she might think that dogs are all as friendly as Bobby and would play with her. Poor Pinky is still hospitalized in vet clinic. The vet are forced to cut off her long beautiful tail as the tissues and skin of the tail were damaged. We're worried that after she got back to the back alley she might got bite again as she's too friendly with dog. Pinky definitely deserves a very good and loving home. Please, adopt her if you're able to. Interested to adopt? Please kindly read our requirements: - Always keep cat indoor all the time - Agree to bring her for yearly vaccination - Provide balanced meals and fresh water all the time - Allow for home visit - Love and treat him like your own precious family members Please give a home to Pinky ♥
description_rewritten: Pinky is a 12-month-old female Domestic Short Hair cat who is currently hospitalized due to a serious injury. She sustained severe wounds to her back after a dog bite, requiring the amputation of her tail. Pinky is a medium-sized, black cat with short fur and is a sweet and friendly companion. She enjoys the company of dogs, particularly a local dog named Bobby. Pinky is fully vaccinated and sterilized. She requires a patient and loving home where she can be safely kept indoors.

description_original: Adorable 3 year old Lily looking for a forever home - She gets along very well with other dogs - Child friendly - Affectionate towards companion - Best guard dog for family or Workplace If interested, please contact Wen . Thanks!
description_rewritten: Lily, a 36-month-old female mixed-breed dog with medium-length brown fur, is looking for a loving forever home. She is friendly with other dogs and enjoys spending time with children. Lily is affectionate and healthy, having been vaccinated and sterilized. She would thrive in a family environment where she can be a loyal and protective companion.

description_original: She was found wondering around Subang area. Active and intelligent. Already spayed, vaccinated and deworm. No tying or caging for long hours except for precautionary purposes. Suitable only for landed property. Too big for apartment or condo. Interested to adopt pls call me.
description_rewritten: Jessie is a lively three-month-old female mixed-breed dog with short black fur and a medium size. She was found in the Subang area and is currently healthy and fully vaccinated, as well as sterilized. Jessie thrives as an active companion and benefits from space – she’s best suited for landed properties. Due to her size, she is not appropriate for apartment or condominium living.

description_original: I feeded her everyday since she was small with her mother and siblings. I rescued her because she left alone there without her family anymore. How I wish to keep her but I am living in Condo. I sent her to a fosterer's house and she has been taken care very well. About her :- #Obedient #Potty Trained #Vaccined and Dewormed #Independant #Shiny Black Fur #Friendly Terms & Condition to adopt :- #Loving Person or Family #Prefer with landed house, she used to poo and pee at outdoor #Walk free, cannot put in cage or chained her all day #The adoption fees is to support on her neuter fees (must neuter before adopt, I will make the arrangement) #Vaccine annually #Allow me to follow up/visit during first year Welcome to contact me if you are looking for a good & nice dog. She will be a good family dog. Thank you.
description_rewritten: CoCo is a medium-sized, five-month-old female mixed-breed dog with short, shiny black fur. She was rescued after being found alone and is currently healthy and vaccinated. CoCo is obedient and potty-trained, and enjoys independent time. She thrives in a home with a landed property where she can naturally relieve herself outdoors. Prior to adoption, CoCo requires sterilization. An annual vaccine is recommended. She is a friendly dog seeking a loving person or family.

description_original: I found cute obedient Minion abandoned at nearby market.Immediately I brought her back to my place and provide her with food, water, and clean shelter. She is very healthy and playful, especially with people and her dog friends. Hopefully she can find a home and receive the love she deserves. Her location is at Tronoh, Perak but outstation adoption can be arranged. If you think you could be the one, please contact me via PM.
description_rewritten: Minion is a healthy and playful five-month-old female mixed-breed dog. This medium-sized, brown dog with short fur enjoys spending time with people and dog friends. She was found abandoned near a market and has received care, including food, water, and a clean shelter. Minion is fully vaccinated and sterilized. We hope to find her a loving forever home in Tronoh, Perak.

description_original: Rescued 3 puppies in cheras. Puppies are looking for home... They are beautiful & good. Appreciate if anyone willing to adopt them. Please call Chloe Lim
description_rewritten: Three four-month-old female puppies are waiting for their forever homes in Chères. These medium-sized, black, short-haired mixed-breed dogs are healthy and looking for a loving family. They have not yet been vaccinated or sterilized. A bright and active home would be ideal for these playful pups.

description_original: She was found wandering around a playground of a housing estate with a red collar. A group of boys was throwing stones at her. We strongly believe that she was owned by someone and is a lost dog based on her behaviour. If you are interested to adopt or if you are her owner pls call me.
description_rewritten: Polly is a four-month-old female mixed-breed dog with medium-length black fur and a medium size. She was found wearing a red collar while wandering near a housing estate playground. Polly is healthy and fully vaccinated and sterilized. Her behaviour suggests she may be a lost pet and we believe she was previously owned. She would thrive in a loving home where she can receive plenty of attention.

description_original: These four fursiblings were originally from a pack of five but one pup died after being hit by a car. They were rescued at a month plus and currently being fostered by a kind lady who owns another couple of rescued dogs. They will make good guard dogs and their barks even made the fosterer's two grown dogs retreated a few steps. Kiki is the biggest of them four and he is the laid-back brother he can fall asleep anywhere and anytime even when his head was on top of the tap. Eat and sleep is Kiki's motto. However when challenged, Kiki will step up and protect his sisters and stand in front and bark. Lala is a feisty one she barks the loudest yet she is a softie inside. Her ears are the most unique pointy to the sides unlike her siblings and she loves any kind of food you serve her. Wawa is the prettiest and smallest in size but she gives you a good fight and will be good in guarding your house with her high pitched bark. Wawa looks the most different from all of them and her coat is similar to a Doberman. Yaya is the most animated and active of them all. She is keen to explore and the first to warm up to humans after they were rescued. Yaya is the most intelligent of them all as she picks up cue faster than her siblings. To prevent more strays please neuter and spay your pups once they are six months old. FOR SERIOUS ADOPTERS ONLY. Please provide them with a loving home with minimal caging and adequate attention and care. A dog's loyalty is for life. An adoption fee of RM will be required for spaying and neutering to prevent them to have babies in future. We do not want those puppies to end up in street again. Please contact Sue Tiong at for further enquiries and more details about adoption.
description_rewritten: Kiki Lala Yaya Wawa is a medium-sized, black, short-haired mixed-breed dog, two months old. This playful quartet was originally part of a litter of five, and one sibling was sadly lost to a traffic accident. Currently fostered, Kiki is the largest of the group and enjoys relaxing, while Lala is feisty and vocal, and Yaya is the most active and intelligent. Wawa, the smallest, has a distinctive coat resembling a Doberman and possesses a high-pitched bark. All four pups are fully vaccinated and sterilized. They are seeking a loving home where their playful personalities and protective instincts can thrive.

description_original: Survivor is a dog who was run over by car and got a broken spine. She has since fallen into drain twice, the second time i got the bomba rescue team to rescue her out and get her into Vet. Now she is being treated for all the internal bleeding, infection . She desperately NEED a permanent place. She has the strength to live but she must be taken care of. It is not a simple task , but please widely circulate if there is kind soul for taking her in. She has lost so much weight through the treatment she needs a loving place to spend her life in.
description_rewritten: Survivor is a six-month-old female mixed-breed dog with medium-length brown fur and a medium size. She sustained a serious injury resulting in a broken spine. Following this, she fell into a drain twice, requiring rescue by the bomba rescue team and subsequent veterinary treatment for internal bleeding and infection. Survivor needs a permanent, loving home to recover and thrive, recognizing that her care requires dedication.

description_original: mr. brown needs a better name, and an owner! as you can see, he's quite a mellow, comfortable fella. someone who would feel at home, anywhere. Wait,Its a she. Frankly, I think that name suit her fine.

Now he is a healthy puppy, clever, smart, active,growing, looking for a good home. For serious adopters only.
description_rewritten: Mr. Zorro is a medium-sized, six-month-old male dog with short black fur. This playful, mixed-breed puppy is healthy and fully vaccinated and sterilized. He was found wandering and is now a clever and active companion, enjoying the company of other dogs. Mr. Zorro is looking for a good home where he can continue to grow and thrive.

description_rewritten: Kutty is a medium-sized, five-month-old female dog with short black fur. She is a healthy mixed-breed and has been sterilized. Kutty is a loving and friendly dog who can also be protective. She would thrive in a patient and understanding home where she can feel safe and secure.

(She will bite if she being disturb) A good guard dog. -Due to some problem in my home, i have forced to give away the dog. I wish she can meet someone who is nice and love dog.
description_rewritten: Abbie is a friendly six-month-old female mixed-breed dog with short cream-colored fur and a medium size. She enjoys playing with other dogs and is a healthy, active companion. Abbie is particularly protective of her food and may become defensive if approached while eating or drinking. Due to unforeseen circumstances, she is now seeking a loving home where she can thrive. Abbie would make a good guard dog and deserves a patient and understanding owner.

description_original: She is very friendly towards other people and loves to eat treats. She is currently staying at the SPCA Penang.
description_rewritten: Daisy is a friendly four-month-old Golden mixed-breed dog. She’s a medium-sized dog with short fur and enjoys treats very much. Currently residing at the SPCA Penang, Daisy is a healthy companion seeking a loving home.

description_original: so lovely,passionate,can be good friend for you
description_rewritten: Ameera is a medium-sized, yellow Domestic Short Hair cat, 24 months old. She is a healthy cat with short fur. Ameera is a passionate and loving companion, and could be a wonderful friend. She is currently un-sterilized and her vaccination status is unknown. Ameera would thrive in a home where she receives plenty of affection and attention.

description_original: They are abandoned cats and now waiting for you to give them a home.
description_rewritten: Blacky is a medium-sized, 12-month-old female Domestic Short Hair cat with short black fur. She is fully vaccinated and sterilized and currently in good health. Blacky is waiting for a loving home where she can thrive.

description_original: Mok was born in JB on 31st August while Awang (the only male) and Enot were found in Selayang on the same week. I raised them form born until today and they were healthy from day 1. I love them so much because they are so easy to look after and very loving. The reason I have to let them go is because I've just recently moved to an apartment and it's not fair for them as they don't have much space to play around and I'm also getting married soon. My future wife doesn't like cat. I really hope that they will get a new owner who'll love them just like I do. They can't be separated as they love each other.
description_rewritten: Mok, Awang, and Enot are a bonded trio of domestic short hair cats. This mixed-gender group, 23 months old, is black and medium in size with short fur. They were raised together from birth and are currently healthy. Due to a recent move to an apartment and upcoming marriage, their current owner is seeking a loving home where they can thrive. These affectionate cats enjoy spending time with each other and would benefit from a home with plenty of space to play.

description_original: Michi was found badly injured two weeks ago, with two big dog bites going through his fur, into his chestbox, very close to his lung and spine, with an serious infectious process going on, in a farm some hours away from KK. Neglecting him would have meant leave him to a slow and painful death. I looked after the cat, and his recovery's been great, but still under antibiotic as the biggest holes hasn't sealed completely, hopefully he'll be healed by the end of this week. I am a traveler, and I must leave Malaysia as my visa expires. We've come all the way to KK to find a real home for him, as I am not allowed to cross into other country with the cat. Michi is male, small size, half-short tailed, about 3 years old, and healthy (no skin deseases). He is quiet, sweet, adorable, not picky with his food, and most importantly LOW MAINTAINANCE. It's hard for me to leave him, as he's the most caring thing I have seen in cats. We had great adventures: we hitch-hiked for two days from somewhere near Tawau, to get here. So you can add "well traveled" to his qualities. I must leave KK by Sat 11th Aug. Still after this date, please contact me, as I may not have found a place for him. Do you think you can give him a second chance? You can also help by sending this page to your friends Have a look at more pictures of Michi Terima Kasih!
description_rewritten: Michi is a small, three-year-old male Domestic Short Hair cat with short black fur. He sustained minor injuries following two dog bites, which required ongoing antibiotic treatment. Michi is a well-traveled cat, having traveled from near Tawau. Despite his past, Michi is quiet and sweet, with a healthy appetite and low maintenance needs. He requires ongoing care due to a persistent minor injury. A loving home is urgently needed for Michi before August 11th.

description_original: Active and clingy, Well-behaved. Rescued 1 month ago
description_rewritten: Jazzy is a medium-sized, brown Domestic Short Hair cat, 12 months old. He’s a healthy and active companion who enjoys being close to his people. Rescued just one month ago, Jazzy is settling in and looking for a loving home where he can thrive. He is not yet vaccinated or sterilized.

description_original: A very gentle, friendly, lovely, cuddly cat hunting for a home! =)) psst. she can nag... but her temperament is perfect, for sure. hahahaa.
description_rewritten: Yakira is a 12-month-old female Siamese cat with medium-length black fur. She is a small cat and has been sterilized. Yakira is a healthy cat and enjoys cuddling. She can be a little vocal, but her overall temperament is perfect. She is looking for a loving home.

description_original: saya jumpa kucing ni di area tempat kerja saya , kesian tengok ade 1 ibu dgn 3 anak dia .. mesti dorg kelaparan sbb dok kt luar je.dlm kotak pulak tu.if ade yang boleh adopt pls call num i..tenkiu
description_rewritten: This medium-sized, black Domestic Short Hair cat is approximately 24 months old. The cat’s gender is mixed. It has a medium-length coat. A minor injury has been observed. This cat was found in an area near the shelter’s location with one mother cat and three kittens.

description_original: Triki needs a loving home where she is the only cat due to her personality.
description_rewritten: Triki is a small, black Domestic Short Hair cat who is seven years old. She is sterilized and fully vaccinated and currently in good health. Triki thrives when she has all of her attention to herself, so she would do best in a home where she is the only cat.

description_original: Hi Meet White and Zack. They're siblings about 3-4 months old. The reason I want to find them a new home is that they are always being threatened by the big cats around the house. I also have 2 adult cats at home. Both White and Zack are very playful. Their mom is a Siamese Khao Mnee. White is so much like her mother with bright blue eyes; while Zack is black & white with dark blue eyes. Both are also not nursing anymore and are litter trained. I may be in Johor. But if the adopter is serious about adopting, we can arrange for the delivery around Putrajaya and Kuala Lumpur If you want to take them home together / seperately, give me a call / whatsapp / sms for further enquiries..
description_rewritten: White and Zack are four-month-old domestic short hair kittens. White is black with bright blue eyes, resembling her Siamese Khao Mnee mother, while Zack is black and white with dark blue eyes. Both kittens are playful and litter trained. They are currently living with two adult cats and have experienced some stress due to the presence of larger cats in the household. Neither kitten is nursing and their sterilization status is unknown. They are vaccinated and healthy. A loving home is sought for this bonded pair.

description_original: I rescued this cat on Pasar in Johor Bahru.
description_rewritten: Kucing is a medium-sized, black Singapura cat, approximately 24 months old. Rescued from Johor Bahru, she is currently healthy. Her vaccination and sterilization status are unknown. She would thrive in a loving home where she can receive the care she needs.

description_original: I save him at pasar pagi amost a year,now he is adorable and healthy ,need a home sweet home.HE IS CUTE.
description_rewritten: Horlick is a healthy, medium-sized male cat. This 10-month-old Domestic Short Hair is entirely black in color and has short fur. He was rescued from a pasar pagi approximately a year ago and is now a sweet and adorable companion. Horlick is fully vaccinated and sterilized. He would thrive in a loving home.

description_original: Sweet, adorable, playful Katy Purry was rescued from a terrible situation, but now her life has turned around and she's the happiest, most fun-loving girl in town. She's a total star. She's: - Soft as silk - Incredibly friendly, playful and sweet with people and other cats - A great dancer when she's playing with toys - Spayed, vaccinated and super healthy - And she's got the biggest purr on earth She's also totally toothless. She had a rare medical condition that required all her teeth to be extracted, but now she's cured and is all smiles. Katy Purry can eat kibble just fine, too. She's a burst of sunshine and happiness who will light up your home. :-) Katy is located in Penang - please message or email me to come and meet this sweet, wonderful girl.
description_rewritten: Katy Purry is a 12-month-old, female calico cat with short, yellow fur. She is medium in size and fully vaccinated and sterilized. Katy is healthy and friendly, enjoying playtime with toys and showing a large purr. She is toothless due to a previous medical condition requiring dental extractions, but eats kibble comfortably. Katy is a burst of sunshine and happiness, seeking a loving home to brighten.

This mixed-gender kitten was found at a training center and is now seeking a loving adopter. Wolf,batman,sally is currently unvaccinated and unsterilized, but is otherwise healthy. A quiet home would be ideal for this little one.

description_rewritten: Jojo and Joji are two playful kittens, approximately 5 months old, with short white fur. They are a mixed breed, medium in size, and currently unvaccinated and with an unknown sterilization status. Despite this, they are healthy and full of energy, seeking a loving home where they can thrive.

description_original: One is playful and another one shy. Both are neutered and very well behaved. They need love and care and i am sure u will do for them.

They are medium-sized with medium-length brown fur and have been fully vaccinated. Lulu and Mimi would thrive in a loving home where they can receive the care and attention they deserve.

description_rewritten: Three small domestic short hair kittens are waiting for their forever homes. description_original: Bulat is Putih's sister. I called her Bulat since she had a round large eyes. My husband had rescued her along with her mother since she still attached with her mother. I love her so much. I hope the new owner will take care of her like I did..

description_original: Umur 1 tahun. Betina dan telah dimandulkan. Makan tak cerewet. Biasa dikurung dan pandai menggunakan pasir kucing. Untuk yang sayang kucing sahaja. Whatsapp jika berminat untuk menjadi tuan baru kepada kucing ini. Terima kasih.
description_rewritten: Kiki is a small, 12-month-old female Domestic Short Hair cat with short black fur. She is fully vaccinated and sterilized. Kiki enjoys spending time in a quiet space and readily adapts to using a litter box. She is a lovely cat and would thrive in a home where she is cherished.

description_original: Lemon was rescued from my kampung. He came to my parents house so I brought him back here. Lemon is litter and house-trained. He is playful,obedient, friendly and loves to be cuddle.He is very friendly to other cats and to people too. He doesn't makes much noise (only when hes hungry). Lemon has been fully vaccinated,de-wormed and he also been neutered(it's good to neutering and spaying cats because there are many stray cats killed by human,dogs and cars everyday. Also,neutered cat don't spray,it can keep your house clean). Lemon is very healthy. New owner will be given Lemon's vaccination history medical card. I feed Lemon Evo after I realized that Science Plan has contain corn(corn is very bad for cat). I give Lemon boiled filter water. Please sms or email me if you are interested.
description_rewritten: Lemon is a healthy, nine-month-old male Domestic Short Hair cat. He is medium in size with short black fur and is fully vaccinated and sterilized. Lemon is litter and house-trained and enjoys playing, cuddling, and being friendly with people and other cats. He is generally quiet, particularly when seeking attention. Lemon’s medical records, including vaccination history, will be provided to his new owner. He is currently fed Evo food and boiled filter water.

description_original: Millie & Milo are adorable siblings who have growing up together and are very affectionate, loving and playful. I would prefer they be adopted together. Millie is a vocal little girl who will talk to you and ask you for affection. She is just so cute and adorable when she does. Milo is the goofy brother who will give you a high five and gently pull your hand so you can rub his head. He also will gaze longingly at you waiting for you to give him a pat on the head. Just adorable. Right now I'm in the middle of moving to United States. So if you are in Klang Valley, I can bring the cat(s) to your place. If your interested in adopting these great cats please Whatsapp:
description_rewritten: Millie and Milo are a sweet, affectionate, and playful pair of 30-month-old Domestic Short Hair siblings. Millie is a vocal cat who enjoys asking for affection, while Milo is a goofy brother who loves gentle interaction, including high-fives and head rubs. Both cats are healthy, fully vaccinated, and sterilized. They are a medium-sized, gray, short-haired mix and would thrive in a loving home where they can continue to grow together.

description_original: Tara is a rescue cat and is now ready for adoption. Very affectionate Note that the adoption fee is simply to cover the cost of spaying. Urgent as Fosterer is relocating.
description_rewritten: Tara is a medium-sized, black Domestic Short Hair cat, 18 months old. This affectionate female is fully vaccinated and sterilized and currently in good health. Tara was a rescue and is now seeking a loving forever home. Her fosterer is relocating, making her adoption urgent.

description_original: This is Fernando.He very Charming & friendly.He can be a good friend..
description_rewritten: Fernando is a large, black Domestic Short Hair cat, 11 months young. He’s a charming and friendly companion, and would make a wonderful addition to the right home. Fernando is healthy and vaccinated. His sterilization status is currently unknown.

description_original: I found them at my condominium area while they were still kittens. They are friendly and obedient cats. I'm looking for a new owner who loves animal dearly.

description_original: This is my 1st cat named Chameng. My husband found her and took it home. I really hope that some one can adopt her since i'm leaving to Sabah soon and won't be able to bring her along...
description_rewritten: Chameng is a large, black Domestic Short Hair cat, approximately 38 months old. She is healthy and fully vaccinated. Her history includes being found by her previous owner and brought home. Due to a pending relocation, she is now seeking a loving forever home. Chameng would thrive in a patient and understanding environment where she can receive plenty of affection.

description_original: Hi all, I have 2 male cats up for adoption. Very manja and mendengar kata. Soothy is the fully black. Salem is the black and white color. Too many cats at my moms house thus I have to let them go for a good owner. P/s : Make sure you are contactable if I want to visit them at anytime. No fees needed just give me cats food will do. Thank you.
description_rewritten: Soothy and Salem are two male, six-month-old Domestic Short Hair cats. Soothy is entirely black, while Salem has black and white coloring. Both cats are healthy and fully vaccinated and sterilized. They are looking for a loving home to share with you. Please ensure you are reachable for potential visits.

description_original: Adoption fee includes the basic medical expenses of the animal : spaying + 3 vaccinations. GERBERA is a tropical plant of the daisy family, native to Asia and Africa, with large brightly colored flowers. Just like this little kitten that we are fostering - Gerbera, she is as beautiful as the flower. Gerbera was rescued months ago at a food court, she was only a 2 months old baby during that time. Poor little baby was hiding under a car and meowing loudly seeking for help as there were a group of excited dogs wanted to hunt her and they kept running and waiting around the car. With help of some kind people there, we managed to shooed those doggie away and brought her home. Gerbera loves a lot to have companion and friends, she do not like much to be cuddled but she will always stay beside you and ask for a pat and "massage", she lovesss a lot when people sayang her. Gerbera is always happy when we're back home, she will always purr when we're at her side. But Gerbera has a habit and we do not know why she has such habit..most of the time when we stand near the window she will quickly run towards the window and climb on the window grill, as if like she's making a performance and telling us that she's good on this (we tried to stop her at the beginning but still..she want to let us know that she's good at this..a spider-cat Gerbera! :P) Gerbera behaves very good on bathing time but she do not like to share her food and toy with her friends. She can eat together with friends if in different bowl but when they re eating same bowl of food, she will be very nervous and lift up her front paw to stop anyone from nearing the bowl but of course she do not bite or hurt anyone.. Interested to adopt? Please kindly read our requirements: - Always keep cat indoor all the time - Agree to bring her for yearly vaccination - Provide balanced meals and fresh water all the time - Allow for home visit - Love and treat her like your own precious family members Please give a home to Gerbera ♥
description_rewritten: Gerbera is a small, six-month-old female Domestic Short Hair cat with short, yellow fur. She was rescued from a food court months ago and is currently sterilized and vaccinated. Gerbera enjoys the company of others and seeks attention, often asking for pats and “massages” when you’re nearby. She is happy when you return home and purrs contentedly when you are beside her. Gerbera has a habit of running towards windows and climbing on the window grill. She is generally well-behaved during bathing but can be possessive of her food and toys. Interested in providing Gerbera with a loving home?

description_original: Was a stray cat. Yuri needs an owner :)
description_rewritten: Yuri is a medium-sized, black Domestic Short Hair cat, approximately 29 months old. She was a stray and is now looking for a loving home. Yuri is sterilized and has a minor injury. Her vaccination status is currently unknown. She would thrive in a calm and patient environment where she can feel safe and secure.

description_original: This kitten is a stray very friendly and loves going into people's homes. Its been outside my hse for the past 2 days. I feel sorry for this little girl. i feed her but cannot let her in, i have just given away 4 kittens and my husband is dead against strays. Please help me find her a good home. I will post her pictures soon. But trust me she is well and very pretty. I can delivery anywhere in the Klang and Shah Alam area. Pls sms me at. Tq.
description_rewritten: This three-month-old female cat is brown and medium in size, with short fur. She is friendly and enjoys being indoors. The kitten has been outdoors for the past two days. She is currently healthy. Vaccination and sterilization status are unknown. A good home is being sought for this lovely cat.

description_original: I have 3 playful kittens for adoptio .
description_rewritten: This playful four-month-old tabby kitten is looking for a loving home. The medium-sized, black cat is mixed gender and fully vaccinated and sterilized. This healthy kitten is full of energy and ready to bring joy to your life.

description_original: Adoption fee is a pack of cat food regardless of size, brand or price. This helps us to feed the strays and so we're able to help more homeless animals. *** It's a MUST for adopter to bring adopted pet for vaccinations and NEUTER/SPAYING surgery. TQ*** This 3 adorable kittens were born at our house's back alley, we've spayed all the female stray cats there except one who's real difficult to trap and she gave birth to the babies months ago. Moji, Mango Ice and Mixed Fruit was very timid and refused to get near to human at first but after months of daily feeding they became friendly to us but will still bit afraid of strangers. Adopter needs to give them some times to get used to you and your house at the beginning. Mixed Fruit is baby girl and Moji,Mango Ice is baby boy. Interested to adopt? We wish adopter would agree to do so.. - Always keep cat indoor all the time - Agree to bring adopted pet for yearly vaccination - Provide balanced meals and fresh water all the time - Allow for home visit - Love and treat adopted pet like your own precious family members Please give a home to them ♥
description_rewritten: Moji, Mango Ice, and Mixed Fruit are three playful kittens born just four months ago. This mixed-breed Domestic Short Hair is primarily black in color and medium size with medium-length fur. They were initially very timid but have become friendly through daily feeding. Mixed Fruit is a female, and Moji, Mango Ice is a male. Despite their growing comfort, they remain cautious of strangers and need time to adjust to new environments. They are currently unvaccinated and unsterilized. A loving home committed to providing a balanced diet, fresh water, and ongoing care is sought for this sweet trio. Indoor living is essential.

description_original: SHE WITH ME ALMOST 3 YEARS ALREADY , I GOT SO MANY CATS TO TAKE CARE . SO I HAVE TO GIVE HER AWAY TO SOMEONE WHO CAN GIVE MUCH OF LOVE TO HER.
description_rewritten: Butter is a medium-sized, short-haired Siamese cat who is 36 months old. This beautiful black female cat is looking for a loving home where she can receive plenty of affection. Butter is currently un-vaccinated and un-sterilized, and remains in good health. She needs a patient and dedicated owner who can provide her with the care and attention she deserves.

description_original: Ada orang buang Miss Black kat rumah I dua hari lepas. I tak berapa pandai bab nak jaga kucing tapi still I tak suka orang buang kucing merata-rata lebih-lebih lagi kecik macam Miss Black yang masih menyusu. MIss Black warna gelap tapi taklah hitam. Rasanya berbulu panjang berdasarkan bulu telinga dan ekor dia yang panjang. Kepada yang nak adopt Mis Black boleh kontek saya. Siapa cepat dia dapat.
description_rewritten: Miss Black is a two-month-old female Domestic Medium Hair cat. She is black in color and medium size with medium-length fur. Miss Black is currently unvaccinated and unsterilized, and is otherwise healthy. She has long fur, particularly noticeable on her ears and tail. This sweet kitten is looking for a loving home.

description_original: These kittens' mommy died in a car accident. I am now fostering them while waiting for someone who are kind enough to give them a good loving home
description_rewritten: This tiny, cream-colored tabby kitten is one month old and has a mixed gender. With short fur, this small cat is healthy but remains unvaccinated and unsterilized. The kitten was orphaned after the loss of its mother in a car accident, and is now in foster care awaiting a loving forever home.

description_original: He is a kind and gentle cat
description_rewritten: Bumblebee is a large, black Domestic Short Hair cat. At 84 months old, he is a healthy gentleman with short fur. Bumblebee is a gentle cat and enjoys a calm environment. He is fully vaccinated and sterilized, offering a loving companion for a patient and understanding adopter.

description_original: Toby was found at a food stall and took "him" home, well we thought it was a "him". While at the vet's you can imagine the surprise when we were told "he" was a she. She kept the name Toby because she liked it and always comes to you when you call her name. She is an independent girl who loves to watch you cook. She likes to do her own thing sometimes but at other times she loves to have her head and chin scratched. Oh and she loves Keropok and lets you know it. She is good with other cats. Toby is also an indoor and outdoor cat. She likes to take her little strolls around the yard and bathe in the sun just as much as on the staircase or by the TV or on a chair. Right now I'm in the middle of moving to United States. So if you are in Klang Valley, I am willing to bring Toby to your place. If you are interested, Whatsapp me...
description_rewritten: Toby is a 48-month-old female Domestic Short Hair cat with a yellow coat and a medium size. Her fur is short and she is fully vaccinated and sterilized. Toby is a healthy cat who enjoys being an independent companion. She often comes to you when you call her name and likes to watch you cook. Toby enjoys scratching and is good with other cats. She is both an indoor and outdoor cat, often taking strolls around the yard and basking in the sun.

description_original: Meet Lexi. She is a great cat and in need of a loving family. She is super affectionate, very talkative, she really needs alot of love and close contact with people. She loves children. In many ways this cat behaves more like a dog than a cat, she wants to be involved in everything the family does. The reason she is up for adoption is due to job loss and re location to my home country in Europe. For viewing appointment and more information, please contact me on No adoption fee required but some criteria will be imposed. Criteria for adoption: 1. able to provide food, shelter, medical care (when necessary) and sufficient exercise (toys & playtime) & adequate love. Our only wish is for our lovely cat to find a good home, so please do not contact us unless you are genuine and can commit to the criteria above.
description_rewritten: Lexi is a 36-month-old female tabby cat, medium in size with short fur. She is fully vaccinated and sterilized and currently in good health. Lexi is a very affectionate and talkative cat who thrives on attention and close contact with people. She enjoys the company of children and has a playful personality, often wanting to be involved in family activities. Lexi is available for adoption due to a recent relocation. A loving home with plenty of love, food, shelter, and opportunities for play would be ideal for her.
